tasks.name: F1 useAgentStepStream backfill on mount
tasks.scope: Closes M31 follow-up F1. New wire type AgenticRunSnapshot + command.getRunSnapshot IPC + AgenticLoopService.getRunSnapshot projection + hook backfill with (runId,stepIndex) dedup.

tasks.name: F2 useThreadList bus invalidator
tasks.scope: Closes M31 follow-up F2. useEffect subscribes to agentic.completed / agentic.failed on the dashboard bus and invalidates ['threads', companyId] so the Copilot thread appears live without manual refetch.

tasks.name: Write-side agentic tools + workload scoring
tasks.scope: New file apps/desktop/src/main/services/agentic-tools-write.ts: three Tool factories (decompose_project for Officer/Senior-Mgmt/Management/system, delegate_subtask + review_deliverable for Management/Supervisor/Lead/system), deterministic scoreEmployee with locked Phase 5 §7.4 weights (0.4 role-fit + 0.3 (1-load) + 0.2 avail + 0.1 past-perf), computeRoleFit keyword heuristic over title+level (Risk #2 option (b) — capabilities frontmatter deferred to M33/M34), buildWriteSideTools level-gated composer, PLANNER_DEFAULTS fallback constants (T7 wires real settings), in-memory EscalationTracker, width-compatible WriteSideEventBus interface (type: string) so existing AgenticLoopEventBus drops in unchanged before T4 promotes new event-type literals into canonical EventType. Tools emit plan.proposed / task.delegated / task.escalated / review.requested / review.completed via bus.emit. Companion test file agentic-tools-write.test.ts ships 25 unit tests: 10-case score determinism, weights-sum-1.0, system/archived/fired score 0, availability+load+past-perf term verification, role-fit heuristic engineer→implement + baseline fallback + system→0, decompose max-tickets clamp + max-depth gate + approval-level gate, JSON-safe envelope round-trip, delegate happy path + fallback chain + escalation threshold + project linkage, review unfinished-ticket reject + happy path + reject+threshold escalation, composer level-gating (IC empty / Officer+SM decompose-only / Sup+Lead delegate+review / Mgmt+system all three), bus-throws non-fatal.

tasks.name: Level-based tool injection + test seam
tasks.scope: Extends AgenticLoopService with employee-aware tool-registry injection so the agentic loop is level-gated per Phase 5 §7.1 instead of flat per-company. New types: AgenticLoopEmployeeContext + AgenticLoopEmployeeLookup. AgenticLoopEmployeesRepo widened with optional getById(). buildTools deps signature gains employee context. StartArgs gains optional employeeId; start() resolves actor via explicit getById path or default system-agent fallback, validates cross-company isolation, and threads actorEmployee through every identity touchpoint (members, runs row, message authors, bus events) while preserving the `systemAgentId` field name on RunState for M31 wire-contract stability. Composition root in main/index.ts now composes [...readSideTools, ...buildWriteSideTools(employee, ...)] in production with a conservative open-ticket-count workload provider (in-meeting/avg-completion stubbed for M33), a no-op write-side orchestrator enqueue (M33 wires the real path), and a streamAgent-wrapped WriteSideCompleteFn that resolves the actor's provider per call; NODE_ENV=test branches to createTestToolsForEmployee. employeesRepo facade gains getById() that maps EmployeeRow → AgenticLoopEmployeeLookup with isSystem null-safe default. NEW test-agentic-tools.ts (298 LOC) ships the ECHO_WRITE_SENTINEL + per-tool canned tables + schema-identical decompose_project/delegate_subtask/review_deliverable factories with sentinel/canned/fallback three-tier resolution mirroring test-classifier and test-agentic-provider + createTestToolsForEmployee level-gated composer + createTestWriteSideTools standalone factory — lockstep invariant with production buildWriteSideTools gates. Tests +11: agentic-loop-service.test.ts +4 (M32 T3 default-actor capture, explicit employeeId resolution + actor authorship, unknown-id throw + side-effect-free, cross-company guard); NEW test-agentic-tools.test.ts +7 (system-agent gets all, IC read-only, officer = read+decompose, management = read+all, supervisor/lead = read+delegate+review, standalone factory IC empty + schema-identical mirror). Verification per commit message: pnpm -r typecheck clean across all 6 packages; biome check clean on all 5 T3 files (auto-fixed import order in main/index.ts and test-agentic-tools.test.ts); vitest green on agentic-loop-service.test.ts (25) + test-agentic-tools.test.ts (7) + agentic-tools-write.test.ts (25) + agentic-tools.test.ts (40).

tasks.name: New event types + step kinds in shared-types
tasks.scope: Promotes WriteSideEventType literals into canonical EventType union (+6 members: plan.proposed, plan.approved, task.delegated, task.escalated, review.requested, review.completed). Extends AgentStepKind (+3 members: ticket_created, delegation_made, review_pending). Ships 6 JSON-safe payload types: PlanProposedPayload (subtask tree), PlanApprovedPayload (M33 prep), TaskDelegatedPayload (fallback+attempts), TaskEscalatedPayload (reason+original), ReviewRequestedPayload, ReviewCompletedPayload (outcome+escalation). AgentStepPayload.data doc extended with 3 new kind shapes. AgenticRunSnapshot.steps wire-shape invariant preserved. agentic-tools-write.ts: import type { EventType } added, all 6 satisfies WriteSideEventType swapped to satisfies EventType for canonical narrowing. step-card.tsx: 3 minimal case branches (ticket_created=emerald, delegation_made=sky/GitBranch, review_pending=amber/Brain) with data-step-kind stable E2E selectors; exhaustiveness guard preserved. T2 string-literal immunity CONFIRMED: 25/25 tests pass. Tests +3: events-m32.test.ts (NEW) — EventType union check via expectTypeOf for all 6, AgentStepKind union + AgentStepPayload construction for all 3, payload discriminator shapes for all 6 interfaces.

notes: M31 (Agentic Loop — read-side) COMPLETE. All 11 tasks shipped, 8/8 E2E green, 958/958 unit tests passing.
M32 T0 + T1 SHIPPED — M31 follow-ups F1 + F2 closed. 964/964 unit tests green; lint 0 errors, 24 warnings (baseline). Commits: T0=f515ea7 (F1 backfill), T1=62a0504 (F2 invalidator).

M32 T3 SHIPPED — level-based tool injection + test seam. 1000/1000 unit tests green. Commit: T3=8bf1e9e. The agentic loop is now level-gated end-to-end from composition root through service to LLM tool registry. Next is T4: promote WriteSideEventType literals into the canonical EventType union in packages/shared-types/src/events.ts + AgentStepKind gains 'ticket_created' | 'delegation_made' | 'review_pending' + corresponding AgentStepPayload variants. Replace `satisfies WriteSideEventType` annotations in agentic-tools-write.ts tool bodies with `satisfies EventType` for canonical narrowing. T2 string-literal discriminators make those tests immune by construction — if they regress, the T4 commit is wrong.

M32 plan doc STILL not yet written. Write it when T2 work begins — use docs/plans/2026-04-14-team-x-phase-5-m31-agentic-loop.md as the structural template. Required sections: Overview, What ships, Invariants preserved, Success criteria, Task breakdown (T2–TN), Acceptance criteria (three-tier test seam + ABI rebuild dance + atomic-commit discipline).

M32 remaining scope (from Phase 5 design §4 + §7): write-side Task Planner tools — decompose_project, delegate_subtask, review_deliverable. Swaps M31's read-only tool registry for the write set on the same AgenticLoopService harness. New event types: plan.*, task.*, review.*.

With F1 + F2 in place, future M32 write-side specs can assume the palette step log backfills reliably and the Copilot Conversations list is live-invalidated. agentic-loop.spec.ts does NOT yet exercise the new surfaces; recommend extending it (or adding task-planner.spec.ts) when T2 lands so the backfill path has an E2E guard.

AgenticRunSnapshot (events.ts) is the new wire type to extend when write-side step kinds (ticket_created / delegation_made / review_pending) land — keep the shape JSON-safe and the discriminator field name `kind` to mirror AgentStepPayload.

M31 patterns to carry into M32: three-tier canned test seam (classifier/provider/tools), {rows, truncated} envelope for agentic tools, data-step-kind as stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController-driven stop with canceled-status coercion, per-task Loki ledger commits (chore(loki): M<N> T<N> — commit ledger (<sha>)).

ABI rebuild dance is mandatory before every T10-style verification run. Node ABI via `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` (pnpm rebuild silently no-ops when the prebuild dir is missing), Electron ABI via `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar`. Document this in the M32 plan T10 acceptance criteria.

Gotcha RESOLVED same session (2026-04-15, plan-doc follow-up): composite TS project references read shared-types dist/*.d.ts from dist/, not src/. Fix landed in packages/shared-types/package.json — scripts.typecheck changed from `tsc --noEmit` to `tsc --build` (always emits + incremental); added `build: tsc --build --force` + `clean: tsc --build --clean`. Verified green via `rm -rf packages/shared-types/dist && pnpm -r typecheck`. Manual `tsc --build --force` dance is no longer required. M32 plan doc T4 + T10 notes updated in the same edit pass.
